flavorPhrases: A loose brick in the alley wall. The mortar around it is barely set.
Under a market stall's false floor, sealed with a cloth rag. The stall has been empty for weeks.
A locked strongbox beneath a floorboard. The key was around the last occupant's neck.
Stuffed inside a chimney breast, wrapped in wax paper against the soot.
The cellar drain runs deeper than it should. A bundle is wedged into the bend.
Behind a panel in the wainscoting, the wood slightly proud of the wall if you know to look.
